definitions.text: In, near, or in the general vicinity of (a particular place).
examples: A climate treaty was signed at Kyoto in 1997.
She's at Oxford University, studying chemistry.

definitions.text: Working for (a company) or in (a place or situation).
examples: He used to be at Lehman Brothers. Now he's at Merrill Lynch.
'Where does he work?' — 'I think he's still at the solicitors.'

definitions.text: Rare form of @; to reply to or talk to someone, either online or face-to-face.
Alternative form of 'at (relative pronoun; reduced form of “that” and/or “what”).
Alternative form of att (Laos currency unit)
